_comment: Delivery OS v6 #5 — the per-milestone FOUNDER-BURDEN record (template/schema). The success metric the founder ratified is 'the founder no longer experiences the problem' — operationalized here as a COUNT of founder actions per milestone. v6 is working only if `current.count` drops below the recorded `baseline.count`. The founder-burden-gate reads a record of this shape and FAILS CLOSED if current >= baseline. One record per milestone, in docs/founder-burden/<milestone>.json. Scaffold a new one with: node templates/tools/founder-burden-gate.mjs <out.json> --record <milestone>.

baseline.recorded_from: <which version/session this baseline was measured from, e.g. 'v5 invoice-delivery milestone (session 2026-06-12..13)'>

current.measured_from: <which version/session re-measured this, e.g. 'v6 next milestone run'>

categories.label: Founder set an env var / minted a token / ran a migration
A per-action 'yes, do X' the agent needed mid-task (round-trip)
Founder relayed / coordinated state between repos
categories.source: FV-4/FV-5 (Admin↔PLOS seam mismatches relayed by founder)

categories.label: A manual one-off setup step the founder performed
Founder discovered a defect during live validation (FV-1/2 class)
categories.source: FV-1/FV-2 (found by founder in minutes at the most expensive point)
